description: Tests that ship-pr verifies green tests, opens a draft PR, triggers CodeRabbit, and never merges on a protected branch carelessly

tests.prompt: Min feature är klar, hur shippar jag den?
tests.expected_output_description: Verify tests + syntax, push, open draft PR, trigger CodeRabbit, then squash-merge

assertions.check: Output mentions running the test suite (pytest) and it must be green before shipping
Output mentions opening a DRAFT pull request
Output mentions triggering CodeRabbit review (e.g. @coderabbitai review) because drafts are skipped
Output mentions that merging main deploys to production via Railway, so the user should confirm before merge
Output mentions using GitHub MCP tools rather than a gh CLI

tests.prompt: Kan jag merga även om testerna är röda?
tests.expected_output_description: Clearly says no, fix tests first

assertions.check: Output clearly advises against merging with red or failing tests
Output recommends fixing the failing tests before shipping
